chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةُ يَكُونُ لَهَا زَوْجٌ مَمْلُوكٌ فَتَرِثُهُ بَعْدُ ثُمَّ تُعْتِقُهُ وَ تَرْضَى بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 124 – The woman happens to have a husband for her, an owned slave, so she inherits him afterwards, then she emancipates him, and she is pleased with him (being her husband)

text: امْرَأَةٍ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ مَمْلُوكٌ فَوَرِثَتْهُ فَأَعْتَقَتْهُ هَلْ يَكُونَانِ عَلَى نِكَاحِهِمَا الْأَوَّلِ قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ يُجَدِّدَانِ نِكَاحاً آخَرَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a woman who had a slave husband for her, so she inherited him, and emancipated him. Would they both happen to be upon their first marriage?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, but they would both renew with another marriage’.
